name: In New York, where the NYT sued Perplexity, how is venue determined for my case?
description: SDNY viable if NY harm; Perplexity fights weak ties—consider CA or harm locus.[1][6]

mainEntity.name: In New York, where the NYT sued Perplexity, how is venue determined for my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: SDNY viable if NY harm; Perplexity fights weak ties—consider CA or harm locus.[1][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Venue is proper in NY federal court if Perplexity transacts business there or infringement harms occur, as in NYT's SDNY filing.[1][6] Perplexity contested personal jurisdiction, arguing weak NY ties.[6] Key factors: minimum contacts, purposeful availment, and effects test for IP harms.[1][6] File where defendant resides (CA) or harm felt; transfer motions common.[6] Weigh jurisdiction strength before suing.
